practices.meditation: Visualize a bright red spinning wheel at base of spine. Feel roots growing from your body into the earth. Chant LAM 4 times with each exhale.
practices.affirmation: I am safe. I am grounded. I belong. The earth supports me.
practices.nature_practice: Walk barefoot on earth, hug trees, garden

astrological_remedies.when_mars_afflicted: Focus on grounding practices, avoid aggressive activities, iron supplements
astrological_remedies.when_saturn_afflicted: Discipline your body, establish routine, bone-strengthening foods
astrological_remedies.when_ketu_afflicted: Stay present, avoid escapism, physical exercise

practices.meditation: Visualize an orange crescent moon shape, or orange water swirling at your sacrum. Feel fluidity and creative energy. Chant VAM 6 times.
practices.affirmation: I embrace pleasure. My creativity flows freely. I honor my emotions.
practices.sound_healing: 396 Hz, flowing water sounds, gentle percussion
practices.nature_practice: Swim, sit near flowing water, moonbathing

astrological_remedies.when_moon_afflicted: Emotional healing practices, therapy, Moon fasting, pearl/moonstone
astrological_remedies.when_venus_afflicted: Creative expression, self-love practices, rose quartz, Venus mantra
astrological_remedies.when_jupiter_afflicted: Expand joy and pleasure healthily, avoid excess

chakras.name: Manipura
chakras.location: Upper abdomen, between navel and sternum

practices.meditation: Visualize a bright yellow sun at your solar plexus radiating power and confidence. Chant RAM 10 times with intention.
practices.affirmation: I am powerful. I am worthy. I trust myself. I stand in my own authority.
practices.sound_healing: 528 Hz (DNA repair frequency), fire crackling sounds
practices.nature_practice: Sunbathing, fire gazing, being in bright sunlight

astrological_remedies.when_sun_afflicted: Surya Namaskar daily, Ruby or Red Garnet, Sun mantra at dawn
astrological_remedies.when_mars_afflicted: Channel anger through exercise, Mars mantra, Hanuman worship
astrological_remedies.when_jupiter_afflicted: Humility practices, gratitude journaling, guru devotion

chakras.name: Anahata
blocked_emotional: inability to love or be loved

practices.pranayama: Anulom Vilom (Alternate Nostril), deep heart breathing
practices.meditation: Visualize a green lotus at your heart. With each breath, expand love outward first to yourself, then loved ones, then all beings. Chant YAM 12 times.
practices.affirmation: I am loved. I give and receive love freely. I forgive. My heart is open.
practices.color_therapy: Wear or visualize green and pink
practices.nature_practice: Time in gardens, flowers, touching plants, forest bathing

astrological_remedies.when_venus_afflicted: Self-love practices, rose quartz, Venus mantra, forgiveness meditation
astrological_remedies.when_moon_afflicted: Inner child healing, mother wound work, Pearl, Moon fasting
astrological_remedies.when_jupiter_afflicted: Expand compassion beyond personal relationships, seva (selfless service)

practices.meditation: Visualize a bright blue wheel at your throat. Feel the vibration of truth. Chant HAM 16 times, feeling the vibration in your throat.
practices.affirmation: I speak my truth with clarity and kindness. My voice matters. I am heard.
practices.sound_healing: 384 Hz, singing, toning, chanting, sound bowls
practices.nature_practice: Singing in nature, near the ocean, listening to birds

astrological_remedies.when_mercury_afflicted: Chanting, mantra practice, Emerald, Mercury mantra on Wednesdays
astrological_remedies.when_jupiter_afflicted: Teach and share wisdom, speak truthfully, Guru pranaam
astrological_remedies.when_saturn_afflicted: Overcome fear of expression, speak consistently, Amethyst

practices.meditation: Trataka — candle gazing. Visualize an indigo lotus between brows. Silently chant OM and allow images, insights, and clarity to arise. Do not force.
practices.affirmation: I trust my intuition. I see clearly. My inner vision guides me.
practices.nature_practice: Stargazing, moonlit walks, sitting in darkness meditatively

astrological_remedies.when_rahu_afflicted: Grounding practices, Durga worship, clear your environment of deception
astrological_remedies.when_saturn_afflicted: Systematic meditation practice, Amethyst, Blue Sapphire (with care)
astrological_remedies.when_ketu_afflicted: Past life healing, Ganesha worship, Cat's Eye (with extreme care)

practices.pranayama: Kevala Kumbhaka (natural breath retention), Nadi Shodhana
practices.meditation: Sit in silence. Visualize a thousand-petaled white or violet lotus at crown. Feel yourself dissolve into pure awareness. No chanting — just pure silence and presence.
practices.affirmation: I am connected to divine intelligence. I trust the universe. I am one with all.
practices.sound_healing: 963 Hz, silence, overtone singing, Gregorian chant, Vedic chanting
practices.nature_practice: Sitting under open sky, high altitude, sunrise meditation

astrological_remedies.when_jupiter_afflicted: Seek a genuine guru, study sacred texts, Yellow Sapphire, Jupiter mantra
astrological_remedies.when_ketu_afflicted: Deep meditation practice, Ganesha worship, letting go of outcomes
astrological_remedies.when_sun_afflicted: Connect to higher purpose beyond ego, Sun salutations at dawn
